subject: [PATCH 4/6] mm/huge_memory: move softleaf_to_folio() inside migration branch

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch moves the call to softleaf_to_folio() inside a migration branch in the change_non_present_huge_pmd() function, ensuring that it only converts PFN entries to folio pointers when they are actually used for migration. This prevents bogus pointer creation and potential crashes on mprotect() when swap entries are present.
